About Our Society

A legacy of community living since 1972

🏛️

Heritage

Established in 1972, serving 221 member families with peaceful, secure living in the heart of Borivali East.

🏢

Structure

Wings A-North & A-South: Ground + 6 Floors with Lift. Wings A1, B1, B2, B3, C1, C2, C3: Ground + 4 Floors.

🌳

Environment

Spacious playground, lush greenery, and a clean, well-maintained campus fostering community harmony.

Facilities & Amenities

🛡️

24/7 Security

Round-the-clock trained security personnel ensuring member safety.

📹

CCTV Surveillance

Complete campus coverage with modern surveillance systems.

⚽

Playground

Large open playground for children and recreational activities.

✨

Clean Environment

Regular maintenance and sanitation keeping premises pristine.

🛕

Shri Gayatri Mataji Mandir

A sacred temple within the society premises for daily prayers and spiritual gatherings.

🛕

Jain Temple (Derasar)

A dedicated Jain temple serving the spiritual needs of the Jain community members.

Redevelopment Project

Access key documents and updates for the redevelopment project

✨ Redevelopment — Path Ahead

We are moving forward towards a modern, future-ready residential community designed to enhance comfort, convenience, and quality of life for all members. The redevelopment aims to transform our existing premises into well-planned homes with improved layouts, better infrastructure, and contemporary architecture.

The new development will include modern amenities such as a fully equipped gym, clubhouse, landscaped spaces, enhanced security systems, and upgraded common facilities. These improvements are intended to provide a healthier, safer, and more enjoyable living environment for residents of all age groups.

As we progress, transparency, member participation, and timely communication will remain our top priorities. Together, we are building not just new homes, but a stronger and more vibrant community for the future.

Scan & Pay via UPI

A/c Name: The Borivali Neelkamal CHS Ltd.
A/c Number: 027200105272235
IFSC Code: SRCB0000027

THE BORIVALI NEELKAMAL CHS LTD.

View your current outstanding amount, bill history, and download receipts

1. WhatsApp your Wing/Flat No. to +91 9082088042
2. Mention "Bill Request – [Your Flat No.]"
3. Bill will be shared within 24 hours
